name: 40 MG Azilsartan Medoxomil Tablets
about: 40 MG Azilsartan Medoxomil Tablets are a type of general medicine that is manufactured in India. These tablets contain 40mg of active ingredient Azilsartan Medoxomil, which helps to lower blood pressure by relaxing blood vessels. The tablets come in a convenient physical form, making it easy to take as per doctors suggestion. It is important to store these tablets in a dry and cool place to maintain their efficacy.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in these tablets?
faq.a: The active ingredient in these tablets is Azilsartan Medoxomil.

faq.q: What is the dosage of these tablets?
faq.a: The dosage of these tablets is 40mg.

faq.q: What is the recommended storage condition for these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.a: These tablets belong to the category of general medicines.

faq.a: The dosage guideline for these tablets should be followed as per the doctors suggestion.
